headline: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
summary: Lorde slammed AI glasses during her Madrid festival performance. She likely targeted festival sponsor Ray-Ban's Meta smartglasses. The pop star found the high-tech eyewear "not sexy."

headline: Shall We Go On Sinning So That Grace May Increase? is hypnotic, healing, and hopeful
summary: Matmos duo member Drew Daniel released a new record. The album is described as hypnotic, healing, and hopeful. Daniel is known for prolific work and diverse musical projects.

headline: Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips
summary: Apple's self-driving car project, "Project Titan," failed to launch. The initiative spurred development of powerful on-device AI chips. This legacy is credited for Apple Silicon's current AI performance.

headline: One of SteelSeries’ best gaming headsets is over $100 off
summary: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless headset is on deep discount. Save over $100 on this top-tier gaming accessory. Available for Xbox (and other platforms) or PlayStation versions.

headline: Disney's Live-Action Moana Bombs at the Box Office With Opening Weekend That Barely Beats Snow White
summary: Disney's live-action "Moana" had a disappointing box office debut. It pulled in an estimated $95 million globally on opening weekend. The film's performance barely surpassed "Snow White."

headline: Obsidian Director Blasts People 'Running Their Mouths' About How the Studio Has Changed Following Xbox Layoffs
summary: Obsidian director Brandon Adler criticized "cold take artists." He's tired of speculation regarding the studio post-Xbox layoffs. Adler defends Obsidian amidst online chatter about its changes.

headline: The Best Deals Today: RayNeo Air 4 Pro AR Glasses, Nintendo Switch 2 Camera, Apple AirPods Pro 3, and More
summary: Discover today's top tech and gaming deals. Find discounts on RayNeo Air 4 Pro AR Glasses. Offers include Nintendo Switch 2 Camera and Apple AirPods Pro 3.

headline: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 Support Crossplay Between PS4 and PS5, Activision Confirms
summary: Activision confirmed crossplay for Black Ops 1 and 2 remasters. Players can now connect across PS4 and PS5 consoles. This clarifies previous confusion about multiplayer compatibility.

headline: At least 27 killed, eight critically injured in Bangkok bar fire
summary: A devastating bar fire in Bangkok killed at least 27 people. Eight individuals are in critical condition following the blaze. Patrons were seen fleeing through flames at the Chatuchak district scene.

headline: Police say no suggestion of political motive in Widdecombe killing after new arrest
summary: Police have made a new arrest in the Widdecombe killing. Authorities state there is no indication of a political motive. No further suspects are being sought after the 28-year-old's arrest.

headline: Thousands may have died in UK's exceptional May and June heatwaves
summary: Over 2,700 heat-related deaths are estimated in the UK. This follows exceptionally hot weather in May and June. The provisional figures highlight severe public health impacts.

headline: Burnham set for No 10: BBC correspondents on what Trump, Putin and others will make of him
summary: Andy Burnham is expected to become the new UK Prime Minister. BBC correspondents analyze global reactions to his potential leadership. Insights offered on how leaders like Trump and Putin will view him.
